```{r}
#| label: read data chunks
#| echo: false
knitr::read_chunk("../R/read_data.R")
```

## Load the data


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Pre-joined data (Version 3)

Angus provided reworked data that has already been joined together.

```{r}
#| label: load dirichlet_dat
#| results: markup
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

```{r}
#| label: glimpse dirichlet_dat
glimpse(dirichlet_dat)
```


:::
